I am reporting an unguarded machine on the packaging floor at Westside Foods, 22 Industrial Court, building B. The horizontal form-fill-and-seal machine on line three has been operating since at least the start of February 2025 with the interlock door removed. Operators reach into the sealing area while the machine is running to clear jams. On February 18th at around 3:30 PM I watched a temporary worker named Luis nearly catch his sleeve in the rotating film roller. He pulled his hand back in time but his glove was torn. The shift supervisor was standing five feet away and said nothing. I have asked maintenance twice in writing to reinstall the interlock. The work order numbers are WO-44119 and WO-44210. Neither has been completed. I am worried someone will lose a hand before the end of the month.
